feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)

entry.title: Pretty When You Cry
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,190Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: You knew that Jason was never yours. Not for anything. Not for the way you leaned close towards some stranger at some dingy house party, sharing a cigarette and letting the smoke curl between your lips, wondering if Jason noticed, and if it meant anything at all that he did.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Gotham Nights
entry.summary:
Author: goldbird_goldheart

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,933Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: You’re walking home late at night and get mugged. A certain red helmeted vigilante saves you and gets you to a hospital. When you wake up, the man that supposedly took you in sounds a bit familiar, but you’ve never seen him before.

entry.title: The Gotham Promethus
entry.summary:
Author: up_tonogood

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,903Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 84

Summary: Frankenstein! Jason Todd, set in the 1800s. Dick Grayson sails into the Arctic, chasing whispers that his lost brother, Jason, may still walk the world of the living. You are a young artist, hired for an Arctic exhibition, who becomes entangled in the Waynes's web of grief, rebirth, and a bunch of angsty monologues.

entry.title: red string (leads me to the grave)
entry.summary:
Author: ActuallyNonsense

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 864Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 11

Summary: if this is a joke then thе punchline goesthe years fly fast and the days go slowthe string went slack, and with it, the quiet certainty that he was out there. you trace the scar on his jaw in your memory, the mop of dark curls frozen in a photograph — small remnants of a life you’ll never know.

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 107,552Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 640

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: it’s a family thing (don’t worry about it)
entry.summary:
Author: peachmiffy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,308Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 221

Summary: “You’re finally here! I’ve been waiting foreeverrrr for you to get here even though they told me it was only gonna be five minutes and Daddy told me five minutes is five sixty seconds so I counted to sixty ten times but you still weren’t here.” “Mommy?” you repeat, dumbstruck.   Two months after you break up with Jason, your future daughter shows up at the Batcave.

entry.title: An Ode to reunions
entry.summary:
Author: Fung1cida

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,607Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 12

Summary: A clairvoyant child in Gotham's poorest streets watches Jason Todd grow up—and foresees his brutal death. Years later, when Jason crawls back from the grave, they must reckon with guilt, obsession, and the unbearable intimacy of having been his secret witness. In the dive bars and crumbling playgrounds of Gotham, a ten-year-old narrator develops a terrifying gift: they see the future. And the future shows them Jason Peter Todd—loud, kind, beloved Jason—with his head bashed in. They watch him from a distance. They never speak his name. They sit at his feet while he tells stories about old gods and green paradises. They break a boy's nose for calling him a coward. They know, with sickening certainty, that nothing they do will save him. Then Jason dies. Then Jason comes back.

entry.title: You Pretty Boys Are Only Good For One Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Anxe_m

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 526Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Gotham is not a city that believes in mercy.Especially not for people like you.New. Unfamiliar. Easy to break.Your first assignment as an agent was supposed to be simple.Instead, it dropped you here. into a city where the shadows feel alive and the nights stretch a little too long.You’ve heard the stories, read news articles.About Batman.But Gotham isn’t just his city.You’ll learn that soon enough.

entry.title: In the Lowlight
entry.summary:
Author: magpietendencies (writtenintostars)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,462Chapters: 6/24Kudos: 137

Summary: There’s nothing recognizable about Jason, except maybe the way he zeroes in on you the second you step into the room. He always treated you that way, like you were what he was waiting for, the only reason he even showed up. “Jason.” You say when you remember how to talk again. You’re vaguely aware that you’re digging your nails into your palms. You tell yourself to blink, your eyes beginning to water, but you can’t bring yourself to, afraid you’ll find that Jason won’t be there anymore. “Hey, Mags,” the figure greets you, and it’s the first time anyone’s called you that in years. It makes sense that it would be Jason who uses the nickname. He gave it to you, after all. ~ You and Jason Todd spent your teen years together under Batman's tutelage and Bruce Wayne's care, your bond going much further than any words can describe. Six years after his apparent death, Jason reappears, both of you angry and dejected, teeming with love you don't know what to do with. You missed each other. ~ Updates the first Monday of each month.

entry.title: Invisible string
entry.summary:
Author: MelMellie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,853Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 1

Summary: "Not tonight. Tonight he was going to ignore the constant urge compeling him to go where he knew his broken soul would found some comfort. You were special, although he was the only one who seemed to notice that, to see you truly. You were also very, very lonely. Eventhough you always tried to surround yourself with people, he could see it, burried deep in your beautifully tragic eyes how alone you really felt. A sort of loliness that matched his own. It all started a couple months ago, at Gotham University. Jason was very late for his first class of the day, European Literature Studies. Since he decided to enroll in uni in the world's literature major, a bit coerced by his brothers to say the least, it them going about how he should want more from his current life. But to be frank, he had been busier than ever with all the classes, projects and of course his and his family nightly activities. What he had first thought was going to turn into an escape from his usual draining routine, quickly became too draining. But he was in too deep now  and too proud to give up. He could handle everything this new way of life threw at him, right? " That's what he thought until he met you...

entry.title: Red Web
entry.summary:
Author: himekaida (AshTree95)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,635Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 9

Summary: Your world crumbles the moment you’re freed from General Dreykov’s control. Thrown across dimensions and stripped of everything familiar, you land in Gotham with one goal: survive. You build something fragile in the chaos—a system, a routine, a web that keeps you alive. Then Red Hood tears straight through it. And suddenly, survival isn’t the only thing at stake. You start as a problem. You become something he can’t ignore.

entry.title: Fighting And Making Up
entry.summary:
Author: Ava_Mae

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,468Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 91

Summary: "No offense, but you look really stressed. You got other things going on?"You sighed again, forcing your shoulders to drop. "Yeah. It was a rough day at work, I got yelled at by a lot of impatient patients. Almost lost multiple people. Then I came home and discovered that apparently I had a hidden security camera, but I know I didn't put one up, and management is apparently pissed about it."Jay went very still for a moment. "A security camera? Doesn't the building already have some?""No it does not, but that's not the point. The point is…" You trailed off when you noticed the carefully neutral expression on his face. "No. Uh-uh. Tell me you did not put up a camera outside my apartment."Jay was silent.You, however, were not. "What the fuck Jay?!"

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Jason Todd/Reader
  • Jason Todd
  • Reader
  • Female Reader
  • nurse reader
  • No Y/N used
  • POV Second Person
  • they have their first real fight and immediately decide they don't like it
  • Protective Jason Todd
  • Reader is slightly suspicious of people doing nice things for her
  • which is honestly a bit sad :(
  • but they make up and talk it out so it turns out okay in the end
  • also Robin the cat (from the last chapter) shows up and is adorable

entry.title: A Different Life With You
entry.summary:
Author: veena_the_aloo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,909Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 78

Summary: Jason doesn't wanna die. He really doesn't. He prays to whatever god that will listen to not let him die again.Whatever god did seem to be listening seemed to have given pity. Because when he wakes, he wakes up ten years older, in a house he doesn't recognize, married to a woman he doesn't know and with kids he's never seen. He's in another man's body. (Can be read as Reader or OC since FMC is never directly referred to by name or described)
